message:
refactor(mux): inline client registration instead of spawn_into_main_thread detach

Replace the async spawn_into_main_thread().detach() pattern for client
ID registration/unregistration with direct synchronous calls to
mux.register_client() and mux.unregister_client(). The mux handle is
already available in the handler context, so the async indirection via
a detached task was unnecessary and made the test harder to verify.

Simplify the set_client_id test to call process_one directly without
a ScopedExecutor and block_on wrapper, adding an intermediate assertion
after the first SetClientId to verify registration before replacement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
